posts.author: ALH (Anita Løvgren Heyerdahl)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

The conditional coloring window has a fixed default size that cannot be adjusted, which makes it difficult to view the selected conditions clearly.

What are you trying to achieve

I want this window to automatically adjust based on the input data, while also allowing me to customize it according to my preferences.
